description: Move a task to a different state on the Scrum Board

fields.name: newState
fields.validation: One of: TODO, DOING, TESTING, REVIEW, DONE

errorCodes.reason: Product, Sprint, PBI, or Task not found
Task already in the same state

notes: Validates that newState is a valid ScrumBoardTaskState value
Returns 409 if attempting to move task to its current state
Updates the task state in the ProductBacklogItem aggregate
